title: Desktop Support Technician II
bullets: Support endpoint, access, peripheral, and clinical-device workflows in a healthcare IT environment.
Coordinate escalations across support teams with clear ticket documentation and handoff context.
Contribute to knowledge-organization and AI-governance discussions using public-safe, genericized framing.

title: Technical Support Specialist
bullets: Handled service desk support for distributed healthcare operations across multiple locations.
Documented incidents, service requests, account-support work, and escalation details in an ITSM environment.
Supported identity, access, endpoint, phone, printer, and remote-access troubleshooting within assigned scope.

title: Technical Support Analyst
bullets: Provided remote technical support in a queue-based service desk environment.
Troubleshot virtual desktop, VPN, authentication, and application-access issues for end users.
Built practical habits around documentation, user communication, and repeatable support workflows.
